channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [5PAISA] 5paisa Capital Approves Rs. 4,688.23 Million Rights Issue with 1:2 Rights Entitlement Ratio
item.description:
🔥 Trending

5paisa Capital Ltd. has approved the issuance of equity shares on a rights basis for an amount not exceeding Rs. 4,750.00 million. The Rights Issue of 15,627,419 equity shares, each with a face value of Rs. 10, will open on March 27, 2026, and close on April 10, 2026. The Rights Entitlement Ratio is 1:2, meaning one rights equity share for every two fully paid-up equity shares held by eligible shareholders as on the record date, March 17, 2026. The Rights Issue Price is Rs. 300 per share, including a premium of Rs. 290. The company's registered office is at IIFL House, Sun Infotech Park, Road No.16V, Plot No. B-23, Wagle Estate, Thane - 400604.

  • 5paisa Capital approves Rs. 4,688.23 million Rights Issue
  • 15,627,419 equity shares to be issued on a rights basis
  • Rights Issue Price set at Rs. 300 per share
  • Rights Entitlement Ratio is 1:2
  • Record date set as March 17, 2026; Issue opens on March 27, 2026, and closes on April 10, 2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: 5paisa Capital Ltd | Category: Right Issue

item.title: [BHARATFORG] Bharat Forge Invests € 15 Million in Wholly Owned Subsidiary Bharat Forge Global Holding GmbH
item.description:
Bharat Forge Ltd has made an investment in Bharat Forge Global Holding GmbH (BFGH), a wholly owned subsidiary based in Germany. The investment, amounting to Rs. 1600.35 million / € 15 million, is in the form of equity capital infusion. BFGH, which had a turnover of € 6.50 million for the period January 2024 — December 2024, is the holding company for overseas investments undertaken by Bharat Forge Limited. The investment is a related party transaction and will be on an arm’s length basis. Bharat Forge will continue to hold 100% of Equity Capital of BFGH.

  • Bharat Forge invests € 15 million in wholly owned subsidiary Bharat Forge Global Holding GmbH
  • Investment is in the form of equity capital infusion
  • BFGH is the holding company for overseas investments undertaken by Bharat Forge Limited
  • BFGH had a turnover of € 6.50 million for the period January 2024 — December 2024
  • Investment is a related party transaction and will be on an arm’s length basis

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BHARAT FORGE LTD. | Category: Investment

item.title: [GKENERGY] GK Energy Ltd Schedules Board Meeting on 14th March, 2026
item.description:
GK Energy Ltd, formerly known as GK Energy Private Limited and GK Energy Marketers Private Limited, has informed the BSE about the scheduling of a Board of Directors meeting on 14th March, 2026. The meeting is set to take place at the company's registered office and will transact business including other matters as per the agenda and any other business with the permission of the Chairperson.

  • GK Energy Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting for 14th March, 2026
  • The meeting will take place at the company's registered office
  • The agenda includes other business matters and any other business with the permission of the Chairperson
  • The company was previously known as GK Energy Private Limited and GK Energy Marketers Private Limited

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: GK Energy Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [5PAISA] 5paisa Capital Ltd. Announces Rights Issue of Equity Shares worth INR 4,688.23 Million
item.description:
🔥 Trending

5paisa Capital Ltd. has approved the issuance of equity shares on a rights basis for an amount not exceeding INR 4,750.00 million. The Rights Issue of 15,627,419 Equity Shares, each with a face value of INR 10, will open on March 27, 2026, and close on April 10, 2026. The Rights Entitlement Ratio is 1:2, meaning 1 Equity Share for every 2 fully paid-up Equity Shares held by the eligible Equity Shareholders as on the Record Date, March 17, 2026. The Rights Issue Price is INR 300 per Equity Share, including a premium of INR 290. The International Securities Identification Number (ISIN) for Rights Entitlement is INE618L20018.

  • 5paisa Capital Ltd. announces a Rights Issue of Equity Shares worth INR 4,688.23 Million.
  • The Rights Issue will open on March 27, 2026, and close on April 10, 2026.
  • The Rights Entitlement Ratio is 1:2, meaning 1 Equity Share for every 2 fully paid-up Equity Shares held.
  • The Rights Issue Price is INR 300 per Equity Share, including a premium of INR 290.
  • The International Securities Identification Number (ISIN) for Rights Entitlement is INE618L20018.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: 5paisa Capital Ltd | Category: Investment

item.title: [DHINDIA] D & H India Ltd. Closes Trading Window for Fund Raising Board Meeting on 14th March 2026
item.description:
D & H India Ltd. has announced the closure of the trading window from 12th March 2026 till 48 hours after the declaration/outcome of the Board Meeting on 14th March 2026. This decision is in accordance with the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulation, 2015 and the BSE circular No. LIST/COMP/01/2019-20 dated 2nd April, 2019. The closure is due to the proposal for Fund Raising that will be considered in the Board Meeting. All Promoter and Promoter group, Directors, KMP’s, Designated Persons/Employees, Connected Persons, fiduciary of the Company and their immediate relatives are advised not to deal in the shares of the Company either directly or indirectly during the aforesaid period.

  • D & H India Ltd. closes trading window from 12th March 2026 till 48 hours after the Board Meeting on 14th March 2026
  • Closure is due to the proposal for Fund Raising in the Board Meeting
  • All Promoter and Promoter group, Directors, KMP’s, Designated Persons/Employees, Connected Persons, fiduciary of the Company and their immediate relatives are advised not to deal in the shares of the Company during the closure period

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: D&H India Ltd-$ | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [RECLTD] REC Ltd. Board Meeting on March 16, 2026 to Consider 4th Interim Dividend for FY 2025-26
item.description:
REC Ltd. has announced a Board Meeting scheduled for March 16, 2026, to consider and approve the 4th Interim Dividend, if any, for the financial year 2025-26. In accordance with the SEBI regulations, a meeting of the Board of Directors of REC Limited will be held to discuss this proposal. Additionally, the trading window for REC’s equity shares and other listed securities will be closed from immediate effect till March 18, 2026, and will reopen on March 19, 2026. During this closure period, all designated persons and their immediate relatives are advised not to deal in REC's equity shares or listed securities.

  • REC Ltd. Board Meeting on March 16, 2026
  • Consideration of 4th Interim Dividend for FY 2025-26
  • Trading window closure from immediate effect till March 18, 2026
  • Trading window reopening on March 19, 2026
  • Designated persons and their immediate relatives advised not to deal in REC's equity shares or listed securities during the closure period

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: REC Ltd | Category: Dividend

item.title: [VARDMNPOLY] Vardhman Polytex Ltd Cancels Board Meeting Scheduled for Fund Raising
item.description:
Vardhman Polytex Ltd, in reference to its earlier communications dated 02 March 2026 and 06 March 2026, announced the cancellation of a scheduled board meeting. The meeting was initially set to consider and approve fund raising through debt, debentures, equity shares, or other instruments, subject to necessary approvals. The company will inform about the new board meeting date in due course.

  • Vardhman Polytex Ltd cancels board meeting scheduled for 11 March 2026.
  • The meeting was intended to consider fund raising through debt or issue of debentures, equity shares, or other instruments.
  • The fund raising was to be subject to necessary approvals, including members' and other statutory/regulatory approvals.
  • The company will announce the new board meeting date in due course.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: VARDHMAN POLYTEX LTD. | Category: Investment

item.title: [DHINDIA] D & H India Ltd. to Consider Fund Raising Through Warrant Issuance on March 14, 2026
item.description:
D & H India Ltd. has informed BSE that the company's Board of Directors will meet on March 14, 2026, to consider various agenda items, including the proposal of fund raising by issuing warrants convertible into equity shares on a preferential basis or through private placement or any other mode. The Board will also decide the date and time to convene an Extraordinary General Meeting through Video Conferencing or Other Audio-Visual Means. Other routine agenda items will also be discussed. The company will file the Corporate Announcement in XBRL format within the stipulated time and host it on their website.

  • D & H India Ltd. to consider fund raising through warrant issuance on preferential basis or private placement
  • Board to decide date and time for Extraordinary General Meeting through Video Conferencing or Other Audio-Visual Means
  • Meeting to discuss other routine agenda items

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: D&H India Ltd-$ | Category: Investment

item.title: [SOLARWORLD] Solarworld Energy Solutions Ltd Approves Bank Guarantee for 500 MW Battery Energy Storage Project
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Solarworld Energy Solutions Ltd has approved the grant of a non-fund-based facility in the form of Bank Guarantee(s) for its wholly-owned subsidiary, Solarworld BESS One Private Limited. The guarantee is for an amount up to INR 6,75,00,000 (Rupees Six Crores and Seventy-Five Lakhs only) under the BOO (Build-Own-Operate) model. The guarantee is for the Viability Gap Funding (VGF) sanctioned for the project under the Request for Selection (RfS) for 'Setting up of 500 MW/1000 MWh Standalone Battery Energy Storage Systems' in the premises of Power Projects owned by RVUNL and GSS of RVPNL. The disclosure of this information is in accordance with the SEBI Master Circular No. HO/49/14/14(7)2025-CFD- POD2/1/3762/2026 dated January 30, 2026.

  • Solarworld Energy Solutions Ltd approves Bank Guarantee for 500 MW Battery Energy Storage Project.
  • The guarantee is for an amount up to INR 6,75,00,000 under the BOO model.
  • The guarantee is for the Viability Gap Funding (VGF) sanctioned for the project under the Request for Selection (RfS).
  • The project is a 500 MW/1000 MWh Standalone Battery Energy Storage Systems in the premises of Power Projects owned by RVUNL and GSS of RVPNL.
  • The disclosure is in accordance with the SEBI Master Circular No. HO/49/14/14(7)2025-CFD- POD2/1/3762/2026 dated January 30, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Solarworld Energy Solutions Ltd | Category: Deals

item.title: [ENTERO] Senior Management Personnel Change at Entero Healthcare Solutions Ltd: Mr. Sambit Mohanty Resigns
item.description:
Entero Healthcare Solutions Ltd has announced a change in its senior management personnel. Mr. Sambit Mohanty, President - Institutional Business, has tendered his resignation and will cease to be a Senior Management Personnel with effect from close of business hours on March 31, 2026. Mr. Mohanty has resigned to pursue a career opportunity outside the organization for better prospects.

  • Mr. Sambit Mohanty has resigned from his position as President - Institutional Business at Entero Healthcare Solutions Ltd.
  • Mr. Mohanty's resignation is due to his consideration of a career opportunity outside the organization.
  • Mr. Mohanty will cease to be a Senior Management Personnel at Entero Healthcare Solutions Ltd. from March 31, 2026.
  • Entero Healthcare Solutions Ltd. is required to disclose this change as per the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Entero Healthcare Solutions Ltd | Category: New Launch
